# Nakul Mahendra Mundhada - Knowledge Base

## Professional Identity
Nakul Mahendra Mundhada is a Final Year Electronics and Communication Engineering student at RCOEM and the Founder, CEO & MD of BiovaCo Nexus PVT. LTD. (DIN: 11781675). He specializes in Embedded Systems, AI integration, Health-Tech, and Enterprise SaaS. 

## Domains of Expertise
- **Embedded Systems & VLSI:** ARM Cortex-M, Verilog, SystemVerilog, PCB Design, Microcontrollers.
- **Biomedical & Signal Processing:** Smart Adaptive AGC Systems, Neural Signal Monitoring, EEG, Circuit Design.
- **AI & Enterprise Software:** AI Integration, SaaS, ERP, Linux Servers, C/C++ Development.
- **Business Strategy & Ops:** Product Innovation, Strategic Planning, Operations Management.

## Mission
To utilize hardware, data, and algorithms to better understand and monitor critical human states, specifically focusing on how neural activity and physiological signals change under extreme stress, seizures, and trauma.
